mapper.select:
SELECT B.TRACK_ID AS trackId , A.DISP_SN , B.TRACK_NM , B.ALBUM_ID , B.DISP_STATUS_YN AS displayYn , B.AGENCY_ID , IF(B.TITLE_YN = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS titleYn , B.CREATE_DTIME , B.UPDATE_DTIME , E.ALBUM_IMG_SIZE AS size , CONCAT(E.ALBUM_IMG_URL, '?updateDate=', unix_timestamp(E.UPDATE_DTIME)) AS url , 'Y' AS likeYn , IF(B.STREAMING_PREMIUM_YN = 'Y' OR B.PPS_YN = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS holdbackYn , IF(B.ADULT_AUTH_NEED_TRACK_YN = 'Y', 'Y', 'N') AS adultAuthYn , D.ARTIST_ID AS artistId , D.ARTIST_NM AS artistNm , F.TITLE AS albumTitle , G.ARTIST_ID AS repArtistId , G.ARTIST_NM AS repArtistNm FROM ( SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , DISP_SN , UPDATE_DTIME FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = 'TRACK'
) A INNER JOIN TB_TRACK B ON A.LIKE_TYPE_ID = B.TRACK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_TRACKARTIST C ON B.TRACK_ID = C.TRACK_ID AND C.RP_YN = 'Y' AND C.DB_STS = 'A' LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ARTIST D ON C.ARTIST_ID = D.ARTIST_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_ALBUM_IMG E ON B.ALBUM_ID = E.ALBUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ALBUM F ON B.ALBUM_ID = F.ALBUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ARTIST G ON B.REPRSNT_ARTIST_ID = G.ARTIST_ID WHERE B.DISP_STATUS_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.DISP_SN ASC, A.UPDATE_DTIME ASC, C.LISTORDER ASC

SELECT A.ALBUM_ID AS albumId , A.TITLE AS albumTitle , A.RELEASE_YMD AS releaseYmd , IF(A.ALBUM_TP = 'MF', '', A.ALBUM_TP) AS albumType , C.ARTIST_ID AS albumArtistId , C.ARTIST_NM AS albumArtistName , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (F.STYLE_NM) ORDER BY F.STYLE_ID ASC SEPARATOR ','), '앨범 유형 정보가 없습니다.') AS genreStyle , D.ALBUM_IMG_SIZE AS size , CONCAT(D.ALBUM_IMG_URL, '?updateDate=', unix_timestamp(D.UPDATE_DTIME)) AS url , G.ARTIST_ID AS albumRepArtistId , G.ARTIST_NM AS albumRepArtistName , 'Y' AS likeYn FROM ( SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , DISP_SN , UPDATE_DTIME FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = 'ALBUM'
) L INNER JOIN TED_ALBUM A ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = A.ALBUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ALBUMARTIST B ON A.ALBUM_ID = B.ALBUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ARTIST C ON B.ARTIST_ID = C.ARTIST_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_ALBUM_IMG D ON A.ALBUM_ID = D.ALBUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ALBUMSTYLE E ON A.ALBUM_ID = E.ALBUM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_STYLE F ON E.STYLE_ID = F.STYLE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ARTIST G ON G.ARTIST_ID = A.ARTIST_ID WHERE A.DISP_STATUS_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY ALBUMID, ALBUMARTISTID, SIZE, ALBUMTITLE, RELEASEYMD, ALBUMTYPE, ALBUMARTISTNAME, URL, LIKEYN, ALBUMREPARTISTID, ALBUMREPARTISTNAME ORDER BY L.DISP_SN ASC, L.UPDATE_DTIME ASC

SELECT A.ARTIST_ID AS artistId , A.ARTIST_NM AS artistName , A.SEX_CD AS genderCd , A.GRP_CD AS artistGroupType , B.SIZE AS size , CONCAT(B.URL, '?updateDate=', unix_timestamp(B.UPDATE_DTIME)) AS url , IFNULL(SUBSTR(A.ACT_START_YMD, 1, 4), NULL) AS actStartYmd , IFNULL(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT (D.STYLE_NM) ORDER BY D.STYLE_ID ASC SEPARATOR ','), NULL) AS artistStyle , 'Y' AS likeYn FROM ( SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , DISP_SN , UPDATE_DTIME FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = 'ARTIST'
) L INNER JOIN TED_ARTIST A ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = A.ARTIST_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ARTISTIMAGE B ON A.ARTIST_ID = B.ARTIST_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_ARTISTSTYLE C ON A.ARTIST_ID = C.ARTIST_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TED_STYLE D ON C.STYLE_ID = D.STYLE_ID GROUP BY ARTISTID, ARTISTNAME, GENDERCD, ARTISTGROUPTYPE, SIZE, URL, ACTSTARTYMD, LIKEYN ORDER BY L.DISP_SN ASC, L.UPDATE_DTIME ASC

SELECT id , name , chartType , albumId , url , size , trackCount , createDateTime , updateDateTime , registDateTime , playTime , playListType , dispSn , likeUpdateDtime , renewDateTime , renewTrackCnt FROM ( SELECT CL.CHART_ID AS id , CL.CHART_NM AS name , CL.CHART_TYPE AS chartType , CL.ALBUM_ID AS albumId , CONCAT(I.URL, '?updateDate=', unix_timestamp(I.UPDATE_DTIME)) AS url , I.SIZE AS size , CL.MUSIC_CONTENT_CNT AS trackCount , CL.CREATE_DTIME AS createDateTime , CL.UPDATE_DTIME AS updateDateTime , '' AS registDateTime , '' AS playTime , CL.LIKE_TYPE AS playListType , CL.DISP_SN AS dispSn , CL.UPDATE_DTIME AS likeUpdateDtime , '' AS renewDateTime , '' AS renewTrackCnt FROM ( SELECT A.CHART_ID , A.CHART_NM , A.CHART_TYPE , C.ALBUM_ID , A.MUSIC_CONTENT_CNT , A.CREATE_DTIME , A.UPDATE_DTIME , CASE WHEN A.CHART_TYPE = 'NEW' THEN 'CHART' ELSE 'RANK_CHART' END AS LIKE_TYPE , L.DISP_SN , L.UPDATE_DTIME AS LIKE_UPDATE_DTIME FROM ( SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , LIKE_TYPE , DISP_SN , UPDATE_DTIME FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = 'CHART') L INNER JOIN TB_CHART A ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = A.CHART_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CHART_MUSIC_CONTENT B ON A.CHART_ID = B.CHART_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_TRACK C ON B.MUSIC_CONTENT_ID = C.TRACK_ID AND B.DISP_SN = 1 WHERE MUSIC_CONTENT_TYPE = 'TRACK' ) CL INNER JOIN TED_ALBUMIMAGE I ON CL.ALBUM_ID = I.ALBUM_ID UNION ALL SELECT A.CHNL_ID AS id , A.CHNL_NM AS name , '' AS chartType , '' AS albumId , CONCAT(I.ALBUM_IMG_URL, '?updateDate=', unix_timestamp(I.UPDATE_DTIME)) AS url , I.ALBUM_IMG_SIZE AS size , A.TRACK_CNT AS trackCount , A.CREATE_DTIME AS createDateTime , A.UPDATE_DTIME AS updateDateTime , A.ES_ALBUM_APPLY_DTIME AS registDateTime , A.CHNL_PLAY_TM AS playTime , L.LIKE_TYPE AS playListType , L.DISP_SN AS dispSn , L.UPDATE_DTIME AS likeUpdateDtime , A.RENEW_DTIME AS renewDateTime , A.RENEW_TRACK_CNT AS renewTrackCnt FROM ( SELECT LIKE_TYPE_ID , LIKE_TYPE , DISP_SN , UPDATE_DTIME FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = 'CHNL') L INNER JOIN TB_CHNL A ON L.LIKE_TYPE_ID = A.CHNL_ID INNER JOIN TB_ALBUM_IMG I ON A.ALBUM_ID = I.ALBUM_ID WHERE A.DISP_STATUS_TYPE = 'Y') AA ORDER BY AA.DISPSN ASC, AA.LIKEUPDATEDTIME ASC
SELECT CHARACTER_NO , LIKE_TYPE , LIKE_TYPE_ID , DISP_SN FROM MMATE.TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = #{likeType} ORDER BY DISP_SN ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CHARACTER_LIKE (CHARACTER_NO, LIKE_TYPE, LIKE_TYPE_ID, DISP_SN, CREATE_DTIME, UPDATE_DTIME) VALUES (#{characterNo}, #{likeType}, #{likeTypeId}, ( SELECT DISP_SN FROM ( SELECT IFNULL(MAX( DISP_SN ) + 1 ,1) as DISP_SN FROM TB_CHARACTER_LIKE WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LIKE_TYPE = #{likeType}) TMP ), now(), now())
